# Quick function to strip diacritics and normalize
import re, unicodedata

AR_DIACRITICS = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0610, 0x061B+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + '\u0670' + '\u06D6' + '\u06DC' + '\u06DF' + '\u06E0' + '\u06E1' + '\u06E2' + '\u06E3' + '\u06E4' + '\u06E7' + '\u06E8' + '\u06EA' + '\u06EB' + '\u06EC' + '\u06ED'

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return None
    t = str(text)
    # remove diacritics
    t = ''.join(ch for ch in t if ch not in AR_DIACRITICS)
    # tatweel
    t = t.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms
    t = t.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # normalize ya alef maqsoora
    t = t.replace('ى','ي')
    # punctuation / non-letters digits
    t = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9 ]+',' ', t)
    # collapse spaces
    t = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', t).strip()
    return t

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # normalized LCS length
    m, n = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(n+1)
    for i in range(1, m+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, n+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev+1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[n]

def similarity(a, b):
    # token F1 or LCS normalized; we will compute both
    an = normalize_ar(a)
    bn = normalize_ar(b)
    if not an or not bn:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_length(an, bn)
    sim_lcs = lcs / max(len(an), len(bn))
    # token-level Jaccard or F1
    aset = set(an.split())
    bset = set(bn.split())
    inter = len(aset & bset)
    prec = inter/len(aset) if aset else 0
    rec = inter/len(bset) if bset else 0
    if prec+rec>0:
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    else:
        f1 = 0.0
    return sim_lcs*0.6 + f1*0.4

test = "لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ أُختَيَّ"
normalize_ar(test), similarity(test,"لا تزوجن اختي")
